name: Subscriptions and commercial benefits

DSH operational purchase lifecycle and tenant/client isolation
WLT financial product, payment, entitlement and recurring-revenue ownership

notes: The technical closure does not self-approve independent product or visual acceptance.
Production deployment and commercial SaaS activation were explicitly outside the authorized scope.

Repository-wide TypeScript errors belonging to concurrently executing journeys were not used to weaken JRN-027 verification; JRN-027 has a dedicated focused type gate and its backend still compiles against the integrated DSH packages.
